description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the image registry.gitlab.com/chrispappas/laravel-ci-cd-demos/gitlab-ci-base:latest with a mysql:latest service and a cache for vendor/ and node_modules/. Define a test stage (default) with a test job that runs the global before_script commands: composer install --prefer-dist --no-interaction, npm config set loglevel warn, npm install, cp .env.gitlab-ci .env, npm run dev, php artisan key:generate, php artisan config:cache, php artisan migrate, php artisan db:seed. Then the test job executes php vendor/bin/phpunit --coverage-text --colors=never. Set variables MYSQL_DATABASE=testing and MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD=root.
